summary: Iteration 28: Verified all 5 security/quality fixes — demo passwords in env vars, vite.config.js postMessage guards, .env.example updated, ESLint no-unused-vars/prop-types warns, AuthContext retry logic. All demo + manual login flows work. 29/29 Vitest unit tests pass. yarn lint exits 0. Zero regressions on /messages, /dashboard, /schedule.

test_results.yarn_lint: PASS — `yarn lint --quiet` exits 0 in 7.82s. No errors, no warnings promoted to errors. no-unused-vars:warn + react/prop-types:warn configured correctly. Ignores include functions/**, public/**, vitest.config.js.
test_results.yarn_test: PASS — 29/29 Vitest unit tests pass (12 in constants.test.js, 17 in mappers.test.js). Exits 0 in 0.97s.
test_results.demoAccounts_env_vars: PASS — demoAccounts.js exports DEMO_MANAGER_PASSWORD = import.meta.env.VITE_DEMO_MANAGER_PASSWORD and DEMO_REFEREE_PASSWORD = import.meta.env.VITE_DEMO_REFEREE_PASSWORD. .env has both keys set (manager123, Referee123). No hardcoded passwords in source.
test_results.env_example_updated: PASS — .env.example includes VITE_DEMO_MANAGER_PASSWORD= and VITE_DEMO_REFEREE_PASSWORD= keys with comments explaining they are optional/public.
test_results.vite_config_postMessage_guards: PASS — All 3 postMessage('*') calls wrapped in window.self !== window.top: configHorizonsViteErrorHandler (line 50), configHorizonsRuntimeErrorHandler (line 71), configHorizonsConsoleErrorHandler (line 144). configNavigationHandler already had the guard.
test_results.eslint_config: PASS — no-unused-vars: ['warn', {...}], react/prop-types: 'warn'. Ignores: node_modules/**, dist/**, build/**, vite.config.js, vitest.config.js, functions/**, public/**.
test_results.auth_context_retry: PASS — Profile fetch retries once (attempt 1→2) with 1.5s delay. On double-failure, toast with title 'Could not load your profile' + inline 'Refresh now' button calling window.location.reload().
test_results.demo_manager_login: PASS — Click 'Try Demo Account' → dialog opens → 'Log in as Manager' → navigates to /manager. 'League Management' page rendered. Toast 'Logged in as Demo Manager!' shown.
test_results.demo_referee_login: PASS — Click 'Try Demo Account' → dialog opens → 'Log in as Referee' → navigates to /dashboard. 'Welcome back, Demo Referee' shown. Toast 'Logged in as Demo Referee!' shown.
test_results.manual_login_manager: PASS — Enter manager@demo.com + manager123 → submit → redirects to /manager correctly.
test_results.regression_dashboard: PASS — /dashboard loads 'Welcome back' with stats and Quick Actions
test_results.regression_schedule: PASS — /schedule loads 'Game Schedule' with game listings
test_results.regression_messages: PASS — /messages loads with Inbox, search input (data-testid='messages-search-input'), New Message button, message list visible

code_review.demoAccounts.js: PASS — Passwords sourced from import.meta.env.VITE_DEMO_* only, no hardcoded values in source
code_review.vite.config.js: PASS — All 3 postMessage calls guarded by window.self !== window.top, no open postMessage('*') calls
code_review.eslint.config.mjs: PASS — Dead-code rules set to warn not error, CI-safe. ignores correctly include functions/**, public/**, vitest.config.js
code_review.AuthContext.jsx: PASS — Retry loop (2 attempts, 1.5s gap). Toast action is an inline <button> that calls window.location.reload(). setUser(null) on both-fail avoids stale partial state

success_rate.frontend: 100% (12/12 test scenarios pass, 29/29 unit tests pass, lint clean)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 all green. Security fixes verified: demo passwords moved to VITE_DEMO_* env vars (not hardcoded), all 3 vite.config.js postMessage calls guarded by window.self !== window.top, eslint warns on unused-vars/prop-types, AuthContext retries profile fetch once with 1.5s delay + Refresh now toast action. Demo login and manual login flows working correctly. 29 Vitest unit tests passing. Regression on /messages, /dashboard, /schedule all clean.
rca_of_issues: N/A — No bugs found. All 5 security/quality fixes verified correctly.
